prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1392→1241→1259→1075→1024，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约235名，2025年基准约1024名，反映报考热 度持续上升；本省物理类计划2021年73人、2022年75人、2023年77人、2024年72人、2025年58人；2026年计划44人，较2025年大幅缩招约24.1%，竞争显 著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第19位持续上升至2025年第13位、2026年第14位，稳居全国顶尖理工类高校前列；2026年 声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校舆情应对高效；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），国防七子标签持续吸引关注；未见明显投档断档记录；信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A等12个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北理工核心专业大类持续高热推荐；福建省物理类考生从2021年11.7万增至2025年19.2万，2026年估算约20.4万（按总考生267900 的76%估算），考生规模持续扩大；北京理工大学位于北京，非福建省内高校，无本地招生偏好；福建省考生对京校认可度较高 ，地域因素对报考热度有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年物理类计划大幅缩招约24.1%、福建省物理类考生持续增加及学校软科排名持续上升等 多重因素，竞争加剧态势明确；，结合考生规模扩大与学校声誉偏负面做小幅修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约861名，区间775–947名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1392 → 1241 → 1259 → 1075 → 1024, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past three years, the ranking has moved up by about 235 places, with a baseline of approximately 1024 in 2025, reflecting a sustained increase in application popularity. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 73 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 58 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 44, a significant reduction of about 24.1% compared to 2025, markedly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from 19th in 2021 to 13th in 2025 and 14th in 2026, firmly among the top science and engineering universities in China. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (e.g., Gong Lin incident), but the university's public relations response has been efficient. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), and the 'Defense Seven Sons' label continues to attract attention. No significant admission cutoff gaps have been observed. Disciplines include A+ in Information and Communication Engineering, A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Mechanical Engineering, A in Materials Science and Engineering, and 12 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities that align well with the admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Beijing Institute of Technology, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be highly recommended. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026 (based on 76% of total examinees of 267,900), showing a continuous expansion of the examinee pool. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, not a local university in Fujian, so there is no local admission preference. Fujian examinees have a relatively high recognition of Beijing-based universities, and regional factors positively support application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the significant reduction of about 24.1% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, the increasing number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province, and the rising Soft Science ranking of the university, the intensification of competition is clear. With minor adjustments based on the expansion of the examinee pool and the somewhat negative university reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 861, with a range of 775–947.

For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<775), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors such as the Excellence Class and Future Precision Engineering Technology. For rankings near the upper bound (>947), focus on Tier 3 majors to secure admission to Beijing Institute of Technology, then transfer to a desired major through internal selection.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1055 → 1014 → 1006 → 1006 → 1041, fluctuating narrowly within the 1000–1060 range, with a fluctuation amplitude of only about 49 positions over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1041, showing a stable trend. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 14 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 32 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 36, an increase of 12.5% compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from 19th in 2021 to 13th in 2025 and 14th in 2026, consistently among the top universities in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics, but BIT is known for its strengths in science and engineering, which has limited impact on History Category admissions. Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), and the label of 'Defense Seven Sons' continues to attract attention. Disciplines such as Business Administration (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A) support History Category enrollment majors, and interdisciplinary directions like Law (including AI dual degree) have distinctive features.

专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social recommendation, while economics and management majors are differentiated and wait-and-see. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, not within Fujian Province. Fujian examinees have a high recognition of Beijing universities, and regional factors positively support the popularity of admissions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the 12.5% expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026, and the basically stable scale of History Category examinees in Fujian Province, competition is slightly eased. With minor corrections based on the expansion effect, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1134, with a range of 1021–1247.
